name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_ids
description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table identifier combined with destination

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_association_ids
description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Association identifiers

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_propagation_ids
description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Propagation identifiers

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_propagation
description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Propagation attributes

name: ram_resource_share_id
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource share

name: ram_principal_association_id
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Resource Share and the principal, separated by a comma

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_id
description: EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table identifier

name: ec2_transit_gateway_arn
description: EC2 Transit Gateway Amazon Resource Name (ARN)

name: ec2_transit_gateway_association_default_route_table_id
description: Identifier of the default association route table

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_association
description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Association attributes

name: ec2_transit_gateway_propagation_default_route_table_id
description: Identifier of the default propagation route table

name: ec2_transit_gateway_vpc_attachment_ids
description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway VPC Attachment identifiers

name: ec2_transit_gateway_vpc_attachment
description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway VPC Attachment attributes

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_default_propagation_route_table
description: Boolean whether this is the default propagation route table for the EC2 Transit Gateway

name: ec2_transit_gateway_owner_id
description: Identifier of the AWS account that owns the EC2 Transit Gateway

name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_default_association_route_table
description: Boolean whether this is the default association route table for the EC2 Transit Gateway
